steps.title: Use the definition
steps.content: The student wants to explain the Bauhaus principle, so the relevant note is the definition of "form follows function": an object's shape should be determined primarily by its intended purpose.

steps.title: Reject mere mentions
steps.content: Choice B mixes the principle with Klara Hoffmann's biography. Choice C identifies the school and names the principle but does not explain it. Choice D names the two elements without showing how they relate.

steps.title: Explain function guiding form
steps.content: Saying that an object's intended purpose should primarily determine its shape directly explains the Bauhaus principle. The answer is A.
